Code CHAR 5 This field indicates which version of the MDS RAI form was completed for this assessment.
15 MCD_CMI MCD_CMI Medicaid CMI Value for RUG Group CHAR 9 This field contains the Medicaid Case Mix Index generated in the RUG calculation for this assessment by the state MDS system.
16 MCDSTCD MCD_SET_CODE Medicaid RUG CMI Set Used CHAR 3 This field contains the Medicaid set code that was used in the RUB calculation for this assessment by the state MDS system.
17 MCD_GP MCD_GP Medicaid RUG
